name: VASO Corp
summary: Vaso Corporation operates three business segments in healthcare and IT. Through VasoHealthcare, it exclusively represents GE HealthCare Technologies selling diagnostic imaging and ultrasound equipment to mid-market health providers. VasoTechnology provides managed network and security services via NetWolves. VasoMedical designs and sells proprietary cardiovascular devices including Biox Holter monitors, ARCS cloud-based ECG software, MobiCare vital-sign monitors, and EECP therapy systems for ischemic heart disease treatment in the U.S. and internationally.
